content.en:
"This is it!"

Ye Tian looked at the black giant mountain in front of him and muttered.

This black mountain is the inheritance of the Black Wind Mountain, but it is nothing special from the outside.

With Ye Tian's current strength, he couldn't even see anything strange here, and his divine sense swept away, and he didn't find any entrances and prohibitions, as if this was an ordinary mountain.

But the peak master of the Black Wind Mountain clearly pointed to this place, this is the inheritance of the Black Wind Mountain.

"Black Wind Mountain is really not simple, this kind of concealment method, it is estimated that it will be more difficult for other forces to find out the inheritance of Black Wind Mountain!" Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.

Immediately.

Ye Tian urged the Black Wind Mountain Peak Lord's order.

Suddenly, a black light emanated from the black giant mountain and fell on Ye Tian's body, instantly enveloping Ye Tian and entering the black giant mountain.

All this happened so fast that Ye Tian couldn't even resist.

--------------

"This is ......"

Ye Tian found himself in another completely unfamiliar environment.

There hasn't been much damage here, and the environment is completely different from the battlefield ruins.

It is a huge square surrounded by a sea of flowers and a blue sky.

In addition, the chaotic vitality here is also very mild, and there is no deadly and chaotic chaotic vitality like the battlefield relics.

And in the square, there are also huge demon god statues, each demon god statue only has its upper body exposed on the ground, and a huge mouth seems to be roaring.

And each entrance is a passage and an assessment entrance.

These giant mouths are roughly divided into three grades of assessment -

Prepare for the peak master assessment!the peak master assessment!the general assessment!

As for the assessment of the king, it is not here.

It's right to think about it, the supreme commander of Black Wind Mountain is the Ten Kings, and without the fall of the old king, it is estimated that the assessment of the king will not be opened, and there are so many inheritance places in Black Wind Mountain, it is naturally impossible to set up the assessment of the king in the inheritance land.

There is only one Preparatory Peak Master Assessment, and in the relatively marginal position of this square, after all, there are too few True Monarchs who can pass the Preparatory Peak Master Assessment.

Maybe for a long time, there may not be a true monarch who has passed the assessment of the Preparatory Peak Master.

The true genius of the domain realm does not necessarily look down on the peak master of Black Wind Mountain, and the genius who can look up to the position of the peak master of Black Wind Mountain does not have enough strength and potential.

Therefore, the preparation of the peak master assessment is actually a rather embarrassing assessment in Black Wind Mountain.

But it can't be set up, so there is only one entrance to each inheritance place for the Black Wind Mountain Preparatory Peak Master Assessment.

Ye Tian walked towards the giant mouth of the Demon God Statue where the Black Wind Mountain Preparatory Peak Master Assessment was conducted, and stepped into it in one step.

After entering this Demon God Statue, Ye Tian found that his strength was suppressed, his divine sense, divine power, etc. were all suppressed, and even his copying talent was suppressed.

Ye Tian originally thought that after entering the Demon God Statue, he would teleport into a space, and then conduct assessments one by one.

But he was wrong!

He wasn't teleported away, he was still in the Demon God Statue, to be exact, this Demon God Statue was like a giant tower, and he was currently at the top of the tower, and he needed to enter the bottom step by step to conduct a door assessment.

But what surprised Ye Tian was that as soon as he entered an assessment hall in the body of the Demon God Statue, he saw three half-step true ancestors, one of whom was still Ye Tian's acquaintance - Longhai True Monarch!

"Senior Brother Long Hai!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"Little junior brother, you're here too!"

Long Hai Zhenjun saw Ye Tian and said in surprise.

Obviously, Longhai Zhenjun didn't expect Ye Tian to come here too, it was too much of a coincidence.

"Senior Brother Long Hai, could it be that you also got the Black Wind Mountain Peak Lord's order?"

Ye Tianchuanyin asked.

"Yes!" Long Hai Zhenjun admitted: "I fought with the Ghost Shadow True Monarch and the Youhe True Monarch in a ruin before, and found the corpses of many True Ancestors, I got the Black Wind Mountain Peak Lord Order on one of the True Ancestors, and the Ghost Shadow True Monarch and the Youhe True Monarch also each got a Black Wind Mountain Peak Lord Order, and after refining, I knew the power of the Black Wind Mountain and the inheritance place, so I rushed over!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian is clear.

It is not surprising at all that there are many peak masters in Black Wind Mountain, and it is normal for a group of peak masters to fall from this battlefield relic, so there are naturally many peak master orders left in the battlefield ruins.

Maybe there will be more True Monarchs or half-step True Ancestors coming to this place of inheritance in the future.

At this time.

The two half-step True Ancestors of the Ghost Shadow True Monarch and the Youhe True Monarch also stared at Ye Tian, and among them, the Ghost Shadow True Monarch looked at Ye Tian with murderous intent in his eyes, eager to kill Ye Tian.

But he can't do it here, even if he can, with Longhai Zhenjun here, he can't kill Ye Tian.

And Youhe Zhenjun is a neutral party, and obviously will not help him.

Ye Tian didn't care about the eyes of the Ghost Shadow True Monarch, but continued to communicate with Long Hai True Monarch.

"Senior Brother Longhai, what is the assessment at this level?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Little junior brother, look at that black giant monument!" Long Hai Zhenjun pointed to the black giant monument not far away and said, "This is the assessment!"

Ye Tian had also noticed this black giant monument a long time ago, but he didn't observe it, and now as soon as Longhai Zhenjun said it, Ye Tian probed his divine sense, and his consciousness entered the black giant monument, and he immediately got the assessment content.

"Nine Soul Forging Techniques!"

This is a secret art for exercising the soul, and it is a relatively rare secret art.

And the content of the assessment is to cultivate the nine tips of soul forging, as long as you practice the sixth of the nine tips of soul forging, you can be regarded as passing this level of assessment.

At this time, Long Hai Zhenjun reminded: "Little junior brother, the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging are rare secret techniques, but unfortunately there are restrictions here, once we leave, we will not be able to remember the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging, we have tried before, so we must practice the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging here." The cultivation of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging is related to the strength, comprehension and potential of one's own Divine Soul, and the higher the potential and comprehension and the strength of the Divine Soul, the faster the cultivation of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging will be. It's a pity that I've only cultivated to the third trick until now, and I don't know if I can practice the sixth trick of the nine soul forging techniques!"

"Thank you, Senior Brother Longhai, for reminding me!"

Ye Tiandao.

Long Hai Zhenjun did not continue to speak, but entered the cultivation.

Ye Tian didn't bother Longhai Zhenjun anymore, but found a futon and began to silently comprehend the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging.

"What a profound secret technique!"

After Ye Tian carefully comprehended, he secretly exclaimed.

The value of this secret art alone is probably no less than an ordinary True Ancestor inheritance.

Once the ninth technique of the Nine Soul Forging Techniques is practiced, the Divine Soul can be compressed to the limit, and the defense of the Divine Soul will be increased many times.

Moreover, the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging can enhance the potential of the Divine Soul in a certain sense!

However, this secret technique is only used to test potential, and it is not a secret technique of divine soul cultivation in the true sense.

"Let's start cultivating next, with my potential, it shouldn't be difficult to practice the sixth technique!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
